rag_rules: Place AGREE contracts in annex agree blocks; use component type scopes for assumptions/guarantees involving ports, implementation scopes for subcomponent bindings.
Insert AGREE annex blocks into the target component or implementation while preserving AADL architecture structure.
generic_rules: Use visible identifiers from the AADL model for AGREE variable references.
Ensure AGREE expressions align with AADL data types to avoid type mismatches.
Avoid referencing AADL properties directly in AGREE expressions unless explicitly exposed as typed ports or constants.
Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
Assumptions and guarantees should reference valid component ports and features from the AADL model.
anti_patterns: Do not place implementation-level bindings in component type annexes.
Do not reference opaque Boolean or enumeration data as numeric values in AGREE.
irrelevant_topics: AGREE validator diagnostics and repair patterns
Model analyst extraction of AADL structure
